results.title: Warangal youth first: MLA Naini on Kazipet coach factory jobs
CSOs urge transparency, accountability in use of recovered loots
results.description: Civil Society Organisations (CSOs) Human Rights Writers Association of Nigeria (HURIWA) and Human and Environmental Development Agenda (HEDA Resource Centre) have called for greater transparency and public accountability in the management of assets recovered from corruption. HURIWA stated that the success of Nigeria’s anti-graft campaign should be measured not only by court-ordered forfeitures but also [...] The post CSOs urge transparency, accountability in use of recovered loots appeared first on Latest Nigeria News | Top Stories from Ripples Nigeria .

results.title: Africa Must Reject Xenophobia In South Africa – Tinubu
results.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu has called on other African countries to lend their voices to unanimously condemn the ongoing Afro-phobic attacks, also known as xenophobia, in South Africa. A united voice, according to the Nigerian leader, will send a clear message to that Southern African country that such intolerance is absolutely not acceptable under any [...]

results.title: Faishal Ibrahim resigns due to ‘lapse of judgment’ over female member of the public
results.description: On Monday, July 20, Prime Minister Lawrence Wong accepted the resignation of Acting Minister-in-charge of Muslim Affairs Muhammad Faishal Ibrahim. This article ( Faishal Ibrahim resigns due to ‘lapse of judgment’ over female member of the public ) first appeared on The Independent Singapore News .
